output.summary: Successfully refactored CSS architecture: moved DynamicContentCarousel-specific styles into block CSS file, consolidated card hover zoom into generic theme-wide styles, added comprehensive prefers-reduced-motion support globally, and simplified swiper.css to retain only shared infrastructure.

filesModified.changes: Removed .dynamic-content-carousel-scoped styles (equal-height card chain, card image hover zoom). Simplified prefers-reduced-motion block to keep ONLY .swiper-wrapper and .swiper-pagination-progressbar-fill overrides (fighting inline styles). Removed .carousel-nav-btn::before and .modal-close-btn::before reduced-motion rules (now handled by theme-wide rule).

Added theme-wide @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule that sets html { scroll-behavior: auto; } and blanket-disables all animations/transitions via *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; }. Added generic .card-post img and .card-team-member img hover zoom styles (transition: transform 0.3s ease; scale(1.05) on hover).
Removed duplicated .archive .card-team-member img and .archive .card-post img transition and hover scale rules (lines 133-142). Now uses generic card styles from body.css.

filesCreated.purpose: Block-specific CSS containing only the equal-height card chain rule (.dynamic-content-carousel .swiper-slide > * { height: 100%; }). Auto-bundled by webpack via glob.sync('./blocks/**/*.css').

warnings: webpack performance warnings (bundle size) - pre-existing, not related to CSS changes

lintStatus.note: All lint errors/warnings are pre-existing in other blocks (Accordion, ButtonRow, CallToAction, ContentWithMedia, DynamicContentCarousel, FullWidthMedia, Hero, MasonryCards, Tabs, TestimonialsCarousel). None are related to the CSS refactoring changes made in this session.

architecturalChanges.change: Card hover zoom is now generic
architecturalChanges.before: Duplicated in swiper.css (.dynamic-content-carousel scope) and Archive.css (.archive scope)
architecturalChanges.after: Single definition in body.css applies to .card-post and .card-team-member globally
architecturalChanges.impact: Any future block using card-post or card-team-member templates automatically inherits hover zoom effect

architecturalChanges.before: Only swiper.css had reduced-motion handling, leaving gaps in body.css smooth scrolling and Archive.css transitions
architecturalChanges.after: Blanket rule in body.css disables all animations/transitions theme-wide when user preference is set
architecturalChanges.impact: All future CSS additions automatically respect reduced-motion preference. Swiper-specific overrides remain for inline-style fighting.
Webpack auto-bundles block CSS via glob pattern. Clearer separation of concerns.

verificationSteps.test: Card hover zoom works in DynamicContentCarousel
verificationSteps.expected: card-post and card-team-member images scale 1.05 on hover

verificationSteps.test: Card hover zoom works in Archive
verificationSteps.expected: card-post and card-team-member images scale 1.05 on hover (no regression)
Cards in DynamicContentCarousel still stretch to fill swiper slides
With OS-level reduced-motion enabled: no transitions on body bg, no smooth scroll, no card hover zoom, no carousel animations
With reduced-motion OFF: carousel nav buttons gradient sweep, progress bar animates

fixesApplied: Pre-existing issue: TestimonialsCarousel.css duplicated modal-close-btn styles without @keyframes definition, causing Tailwind 4 build error. Linter auto-restored file with @reference directive.
